Table	Create Table
collection_job_history	CREATE TABLE `collection_job_history` (
  `id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `schedule_id` varchar(36) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `source_type` varchar(50) COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('success','failure','running') COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci NOT NULL,
  `started_at` bigint(20) NOT NULL,
  `completed_at` bigint(20) DEFAULT NULL,
  `evidence_collected` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `error_message` text COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci DEFAULT NULL,
  `duration_ms` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
